analysis_id.description: Stable identifier for the analysis run.

decision_problem_id.description: Identifier of the decision problem being analyzed.

analysis_type.description: Discriminator for the EVPI result contract.

willingness_to_pay.description: Decision threshold used for the calculation.

expected_current_value.description: Expected value under the current decision rule.

expected_perfect_information.description: Expected value if all uncertainty were resolved.

strategy_names.description: Ordered strategy labels used for optional per-strategy outputs.

expected_net_benefit_by_strategy.description: Optional net-benefit summary aligned to strategy_names.

method.description: Optional method label for the estimator.
